description: You are a GIS technician creating a land parcel boundary drawing from survey coordinate data. Create a drawing in LibreCAD saved to ~/Documents/LibreCAD/survey_plot.dxf. The drawing must feature a closed polyline on a layer named 'PARCEL_BOUNDARY' (Red/color index 1, Continuous) connecting survey points P1 (0, 0), P2 (50, 0), P3 (55, 35), P4 (25, 45), and P5 (0, 30). On a layer named 'ANNOTATIONS' (Green/color index 3, Continuous), include the text 'PARCEL A-2047' at approximately (22, 22) with height 2.0, and the text 'AREA: 2050 sq m' at approximately (22, 17) with height 1.5.
